name: Green Tamales Filling (Pork or Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 1 kilogram pork meat, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pork in boiling water until tender, then drain and set aside.
2. In a separate pot of cool water, cook the green tomatoes until just tender (about 5 minutes). Drain and grind with the onion, garlic, chiles, and salt to create the filling mixture.
3. Heat a small amount of vegetable oil in a pan. Add the ground salsa mixture and sauté for about 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the cooked pork meat and some reserved broth to the pan, stirring until heated through.
5. You can replace the pork with chicken if desired.
